sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei ading tul sawm tul-then sang hoih
Zangkuam unok paak zah a hoih,
Ka deih teng a sung om hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Dah hun ciang hong hehnem in haksat
Na vangik khempeuh hong suan in hong ci.
Kei ading tulsawm tulthen sang hoihzaw hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ze-et hun ciang a muanhuai ka tau sang hi.
Ka sung pan a vangliatna tawh hong kem

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Leitung in kei hong nial in, Satan in hong do hang
Jesuh hangin ka ma ka tun
Kei a ding tulsawm tul-then sang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Aman hong nusia ngeilo ding, zong hong nial ngeilo ding,
Kei tung ah bangbang piang ta leh,
Man-na tawh ka kha hong vak ding nuam lua veng

sections.label: Chorus
lines: ning, Topa ka mu ding hi,
Lung nopna guntui a luanna mun hi.
Kei a ding tulsawm tul-then sang hoih zaw hi.
